text:
TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total charge amount associated with the 'other' 
revenue center codes from all claim records included in the stay. The 'other' codes include 0002–0099, 
022x, 023x, 024x, 052x, 053x, 055x–060x, 064x–070x, 076x–078x,090x–095x, and 099x.
